case.title: STANDARD CIGAR CO. v. TABACALERA SEVERIANO JORGE

opinion.h4: STANDARD CIGAR CO. v. TABACALERA SEVERIANO JORGE, (1964)
STANDARD CIGAR CO. v. TABACALERA SEVERIANO JORGE, S. A. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE FIFTH CIRCUIT. No. 78. Decided April 6, 1964.
opinion.p: Certiorari granted; judgment vacated; and case remanded.
Thomas H. Anderson and Herbert L. Nadeau for respondent.

The petition for writ of certiorari is granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded to the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit for further consideration in light of Banco Nacional de Cuba v. Sabbatino, ante, p. 398.
